aids.title: File Operations: COWARDS
aids.content:
C - Create
O - Open
W - Write
A - Append (write at end)
R - Read
D - Delete
S - Seek (position)

aids.title: Access Methods
aids.content:
Sequential: Tape recorder (play forward)
Direct: Vinyl record (jump to track)
Indexed: Book with index (look up, then go)
